title: Cozy Critters
description: Remodeled Farm animals with tons of new Variants!
body:
Remodeled Farm animals with tons of new Variants!

Remodeled mobs:

  • Cows/Mooshrooms
  • Chickens
  • Pigs
  • Sheep

Randomized Traits:

  • Cow horn lengths
  • Pig ear shapes
  • Pig tusks
  • Sheep horn types

Features:

  • Animations: floppy ears and wiggly tails
  • Fully dyed sheep
  • Extra detailed saddles on pigs

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Cozy Critters should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
